site.name: Spain 24/7
site.tagline: Tools for foreign property owners in Spain

hero.title: Own a home in Spain? Here is the easy part.
hero.sub: Calculate your taxes, audit your costs, and stay on top of your Spanish property in minutes. No Spanish required.

tools.heading: Three tools. Built for your Spanish property.
tools.sub: Made by people who own property in Spain. Free, accurate, and clear.

tax.title: Modelo 210 Tax Calculator
tax.desc: Work out your non-resident property tax in under two minutes. Get a clear, personalised breakdown.

cost.title: Property Cost Audit
cost.desc: See what your Spanish home really costs you each year. Find hidden fees and easy savings.

rental.title: Rental Income Tax
rental.desc: Work out the tax on your Spanish rental income, quarter by quarter. Built for non-residents.

why.heading: Why we built these tools
why.body: Owning a home in Spain should feel like a holiday, not a paperwork project. Spanish-only websites, confusing tax forms, and hidden fees waste your time and your money. These tools give you clear answers in your own language so you can make confident decisions about your property.

footer.tagline: Tools for foreign property owners in Spain

tax.intro_body: Most foreign property owners underpay, miss the deadline, or have never filed at all. This calculator shows your exact Modelo 210 obligation in under 2 minutes.
tax.country_hint: Your country of residence determines your tax rate in Spain.
tax.use_q: How do you use your Spanish property?
tax.use_hint: This determines how your taxable income is calculated.
tax.cadastral_q: What is your property's cadastral value?
tax.cadastral_hint: Find it on your annual IBI (council tax) bill, listed as "Valor catastral".
tax.cadastral_skip: Use a typical estimate (€100,000) and continue
tax.revision_q: Has your cadastral value been revised in the last 10 years?
tax.revision_hint: A General Cadastral Revision changes your tax rate from 2% to 1.1%. If unsure, we use 2%, the more conservative assumption.
tax.rental_q: What was your total rental income last year?
tax.rental_hint: Enter gross rental income before expenses. EU/EEA residents may deduct costs. UK and non-EU residents are taxed on gross income.
tax.filing_hint: Modelo 210 is the Spanish non-resident property tax return, due by December 31 each year.
tax.email_hint: Enter your email to receive your full breakdown and a personalised summary of your situation.
tax.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
tax.email_privacy: We will not share your email. Trusted by 2,000+ foreign property owners in Spain.
tax.result_headline_current: Here is your annual tax obligation.
tax.result_headline_unfiled_one: You may have 1 year of unfiled returns.
tax.result_headline_unfiled_many: You may have {n} years of unfiled returns.
tax.liability_disclaimer: Estimates only. Spain can assess up to 4 prior years. Consult a tax professional for your exact position.
tax.footer: For guidance only. Not legal or tax advice. Consult a qualified tax professional for your specific situation. Spain 24/7.
tax.cross_cost: Check if you are overpaying on fees and energy
tax.use_personal_d: I use it myself. I do not rent it out.
tax.use_short_d: Rented to tourists or guests, usually by the week.
tax.use_long_d: Rented to tenants on a monthly or annual basis.
tax.use_mixed_d: I use it part of the year and rent it out the rest.
tax.filing_always_d: I have filed Modelo 210 every year without exception.
tax.filing_missed_d: I have missed one or more years.
tax.filing_never_d: I have not filed a Spanish property tax return.
tax.filing_unsure_d: I am not certain what Modelo 210 is or whether I have filed.

bueno_cta.tax_body: We can file your Modelo 210 for you, in your language, with real human support. Transparent fees. No surprises.
bueno_cta.cost_body: We bring your Spanish account, card, energy, and tax filing into one place, in your language, for one transparent yearly price. Most members save more than it costs.
bueno_cta.rental_title: Want your rental tax filed for you?
bueno_cta.rental_body: We file your quarterly and annual Modelo 210 for you, in your language, with every deduction correctly applied and real human support. Transparent fees. No surprises.
